Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' executions that are part of the most frequent variant ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' compared to the frequency of 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' across all cases
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment'

Name: Percentage of cases where 'Accepted + In Progress' occurs at least once and the case ends with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' events that directly precede 'Completed + In Call' without any intermediate activity
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities that belong to cases with impact level 'High' or 'Medium' and conclude with 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all cases

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' in variants whose average performance (duration) is below the median performance of all variants ending in 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Percentage of total 'Completed + In Call' occurrences that are immediately preceded by 'Accepted + In Progress'
Metric: Percentage of 'Completed + In Call' out of all 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: Number of distinct cases containing both 'Accepted + In Progress' and 'Completed + In Call' in sequence
Metric: Number of 'Accepted + In Progress' activities for cases where activity 'Completed + In Call' occurs

Name: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' executions that occur more than once in the same case and are followed later by 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: the average of the function base > 1 where base is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Accepted + In Progress' filtered by the function ma > 0 where ma is the number of times `ACTIVITY` == 'Completed + In Call'

Name: Frequency of 'Accepted + In Progress' relative to 'Completed + Resolved' in cases that do not contain 'Completed + In Call'
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all cases where 'Completed + In Call' does not happen

Name: Percentage of variants starting with 'Accepted + In Progress' that include 'Completed + In Call' as a terminal or intermediate activity
Metric: Percentage of 'Accepted + In Progress' out of all 'Completed + In Call'
